_note: recon is deterministic and normally needs NO LLM call. This fixture is only used when the user opts into an LLM-written recon SUMMARY. The structured recon facts themselves come from the real tools (lief/pyelftools/strings), not from here.

findings.title: Attack-surface summary for {{target_name|/sbin/httpd}}
findings.summary: Network-facing {{format|ELF}} {{arch|MIPS}} binary with weak mitigations; exposes an HTTP/CGI interface and links a custom parsing library.
findings.reasoning: Imports include socket/recv/strcpy/system; no stack canary and no PIE per mitigation flags; strings reference '/cgi-bin/' and 'admin.cgi'. Good first targets: request parsing and CGI dispatch.
